title: cuscuta cordofana
intro: Cuscuta cordofana is a parasitic plant species that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae and is commonly known as Dodder. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cuscuta cordofana include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and possess antitumor properties. Cuscuta cordofana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, often in combination with other herbs, to maximize its medicinal benefits.
